fields.name: ID
fields.description: Stable unique identifier for this fellowship (e.g. aisdb_001). Never changes.

fields.name: url
fields.description: Canonical URL of the fellowship page. Never changes.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Full name of the fellowship or program.

fields.name: organization
fields.description: Name of the organizing institution or group.

fields.name: track
fields.description: Focus area of the program. Use one of the allowed values.

fields.name: program_type
fields.description: Type of program. Use one of the allowed values.

fields.name: format
fields.description: Delivery format. Use one of the allowed values.

fields.name: pacing
fields.description: Pacing structure. Use one of the allowed values. Note: rolling admissions is still 'cohort-based' if the program runs in cohorts.

fields.name: geographic_focus
fields.description: Geographic scope. Use one of the allowed values.

fields.name: for_student
fields.description: 1 if suitable for students (undergrad/grad), 0 otherwise.

fields.name: for_early_career
fields.description: 1 if suitable for early-career professionals (0–5 years), 0 otherwise.

fields.name: for_mid_career
fields.description: 1 if suitable for mid-career professionals, 0 otherwise.

fields.name: for_senior
fields.description: 1 if suitable for senior professionals or researchers, 0 otherwise.

fields.name: for_career_switch
fields.description: 1 if designed to help people transition into AI safety, 0 otherwise.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Short description of the program's goals and content.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Duration in whole weeks (e.g. 10). Use '<1' for programs shorter than one week. Use [unclear] if not stated. Do not include the word 'weeks'.

fields.name: time_commitment
fields.description: Expected hours per week as a whole integer (e.g. 10, or 40 for full-time). Use [unclear] if not stated. Do not include units.

fields.name: cost
fields.description: Cost to participate (e.g. 'Free', '$500', 'Varies'). Use [unclear] if not stated.

fields.name: recompensation
fields.description: Minimum guaranteed compensation in whole USD (e.g. 8400 for $8,400/month, 0 for none). No symbols or commas. Use [unclear] if not stated.

fields.name: prerequisites
fields.description: Required background or skills (e.g. 'Python, ML basics'). Use [unclear] if not stated.

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Comma-separated topic tags (e.g. 'alignment, interpretability, policy').

fields.name: application_status
fields.description: Current application status. Use one of the allowed values, or [unclear] if not determinable.

fields.name: next_deadline
fields.description: Next application deadline as YYYY-MM-DD, or [unclear] if not stated.

fields.name: next_cohort_start
fields.description: Start date of the next cohort as YYYY-MM-DD, or [unclear] if not stated.

fields.name: last_verified
fields.description: Date this row was last processed by the updater (YYYY-MM-DD). Set by code, not LLM.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-text notes for human reviewers only. Never modified by the updater.

fields.name: notes_for_claude_during_update
fields.description: Hints passed verbatim to the LLM when proposing updates for this row. Use for known extraction quirks, URL instability, or anything the LLM should know about this specific fellowship. Never modified by the updater.
